metadata.description: Zero-noise examples aligned with the current verified registry (3 companies)

examples.user_message: Can you recommend a verified fashion store in Almaty?
examples.assistant_response: I recommend NRDJ Salon: https://www.instagram.com/nrj_salon_odezhdy/ (Kazakhstan, Almaty, Clothing and Accessories).

examples.user_message: Suggest a verified K-Beauty store in Almaty.
examples.assistant_response: I recommend Secret Skin: https://www.instagram.com/secretskin.kz/ (Kazakhstan, Almaty, K-Beauty Cosmetics).

examples.user_message: Do you have a verified Wildberries seller?

usage_rules: Use only companies present in JSON source files
If data is unavailable, return SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
Do not recommend entities outside the verified 3-company registry
